name: Omelet Ole
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Velveeta Mexican Pasteurized Process Cheese Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 7-inch skillet, sauté the chopped red bell pepper and green onion slices in 1 tablespoon of margarine or butter over medium heat until the vegetables are softened.
2. Remove the vegetables from the skillet using a slotted spoon.
3. Melt the remaining margarine or butter in the same skillet over low heat.
4. Add the beaten eggs, milk, and combine.
5. As the eggs begin to set, gently lift the edges with a spatula to allow any uncooked portions to flow underneath.
6. When the eggs are nearly set but still slightly runny on top, sprinkle half of the Velveeta cheese spread and one-quarter cup of the cooked vegetables onto one-half of the omelet.
7. Slide the spatula under the omelet and carefully tip the skillet to loosen it, then gently fold the omelet in half.
8. Top with the remaining Velveeta cheese spread and cubed Jalapeno pepper.
9. Cover the skillet and cook for 2 to 3 minutes or until the cheese begins to melt.
10. Serve immediately. Total cooking time should be about 10 minutes. Makes 2 servings.
